name: GcpProviderConnection
description: Google Cloud Platform connection supporting inline, runner, and browser OAuth authentication modes.

fields.name: auth_mode
fields.description: Authentication mode. inline: service account key stored in spec; runner: runner uses Workload Identity or ADC; browser_oauth: delegated OAuth tokens via Google consent flow.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration in the same organization. Required when auth_mode=runner, optional when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: service_account_key_base64
fields.description: Base64-encoded Google Service Account JSON key. Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: oauth_user_email
fields.description: Email of the user who authorized via browser OAuth. Display-only, populated from Google ID token claims.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.description: Google Cloud OAuth refresh token for browser_oauth mode. Required when auth_mode=browser_oauth.
